title: Unctuous Roasted Italian Beef Risotto
description: A hearty, dense Italian dish featuring roasted beef and rich risotto, served on a hot stone plate. This ayurvedic-sattvic-friendly recipe uses hot beef stock and a brine-wet cooking method.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 300 degrees Fahrenheit.
Season the roasted beef with salt and black pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a large saucepan over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Add the Arborio rice and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the white wine and cook until the liquid is almost completely absorbed.
Add 1/2 cup of hot beef stock to the rice mixture and stir until absorbed.
Repeat the process of adding the beef stock in 1/2 cup increments, stirring until absorbed, until the rice is cooked and creamy.
Stir in the grated Grana Padano cheese and chopped fresh parsley.
Serve the risotto on a hot stone plate, topped with sliced roasted beef.
